misc.text: For the good of all manga artists: Don't create an official social media account here and don't interact with the fans, it can only be detrimental. Instead, create a private account and do what you want. :) (I can easily imagine Oda doing the same.)

misc.title: #ONEPIECE I had the pleasure of doing a bit of LO/ Genga for 1163, the scene when the crew travels under the root of the large tree together. Thank you to Kashiwaguma-san, Aoki-san, and Koyama-san for
misc.text: #ONEPIECE I had the pleasure of doing a bit of LO/ Genga for 1163, the scene when the crew travels under the root of the large tree together. Thank you to Kashiwaguma-san, Aoki-san, and Koyama-san for their trust and guidance, and to the entire team for their incredible work! 🙇‍♀️
